array.string: unset CLAUDECODE; cd "/Users/openclaw/Library/Mobile Documents/com~apple~CloudDocs/FreeMyMemories/_paperclip"; NODE=/Users/openclaw/homebrew/bin/node; if ! $NODE -e "const f=require('fs').readFileSync('server/src/services/heartbeat.ts','utf8'); if(!f.includes('wakeOnComment')){process.exit(1)}" 2>/dev/null; then echo "FATAL: wakeOnComment patch missing from Paperclip. Rebase the freemymemories/local-customizations branch. See 03-Operations/platform/runbooks/paperclip-update.md" >&2; exit 1; fi; if ! $NODE -e "const f=require('fs').readFileSync('server/src/adapters/registry.ts','utf8'); if(!f.includes('supportsLocalAgentJwt: true')){process.exit(1)}" 2>/dev/null; then echo "FATAL: supportsLocalAgentJwt patch missing from registry.ts. Rebase the freemymemories/local-customizations branch. See 03-Operations/platform/runbooks/paperclip-update.md" >&2; exit 1; fi; export BETTER_AUTH_SECRET=b7e3da3cb84d76906bb59c76c071a55fcfcdbce59884362ee2685d43d16c3ecf; export BETTER_AUTH_BASE_URL=http://localhost:3100; /Users/openclaw/homebrew/bin/pnpm dev --tailscale-auth
